title: Nourishment with Ease
subtitle: Focusing on comfort over quantity
description: At this stage, nausea may feel more intense and appetite may be low. Prioritizing hydration and eating small amounts of tolerable foods can help you stay nourished without adding discomfort.
what_to_expect: Low appetite or difficulty eating full meals
Need to focus on what feels tolerable rather than quantity
nutrition_focus: Eat very small portions based on comfort
recommended_foods: Light foods like plain khichdi, dal water, or soft rice
Simple snacks like toast, crackers, or biscuits
Fruits like banana, apple, or sweet lime
hydration: Take small, frequent sips of water
Include coconut water, lemon water, or clear soups
reassurance: Even small amounts of food and fluids are enough to support your body during this phase.

diabetes.personalized_description: Managing small, frequent intake becomes important to maintain steady energy levels.
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils and paneer
diabetes.reassurance: Small and regular meals can help you stay balanced even with low appetite.

anemia.personalized_description: Even during low appetite, small portions of iron-rich foods remain helpful.
nutrition_focus: Include iron-rich foods in small quantities
Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
anemia.reassurance: Small, consistent intake supports your strength gradually.

hypertension.personalized_description: Light and simple meals can help maintain comfort and stable blood pressure.
nutrition_focus: Maintain regular intake even in small amounts
hypertension.reassurance: Simple and regular intake can support balance and comfort.

thyroid.personalized_description: Maintaining even small, consistent meals supports overall balance.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency, even in small amounts, supports your body's balance.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, focusing on small, frequent, and simple intake can help maintain balance during this phase.
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Gentle and consistent nourishment is enough to support your body right now.
